Title: Pecht, Friedrich
Overview: In the early 1890's Pecht and Moritz Carrière were the subject of a newspaper attack by the young Richard Muther in the Münchner Neuesten Nachrichten for being provincial.
Sources: Metzler Kunsthistoriker Lexikon: zweihundert Porträts deutschsprachiger Autoren aus vier Jahrhunderten. Stuttgart: Metzler, 1999, pp. 278, 304-5.
